name: Apple and Creamcheese Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Apples (peeled and sliced, such as Pippin or Granny Smith)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream together butter (or margarine) and cream cheese until smooth.
3. Gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Stir in almond extract.
6. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and lemon juice.
7. Alternately add the dry mixture to the creamed mixture with milk, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix well after each addition.
8. Pour batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
9. In a small bowl, mix together 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tbsp flour, and cinnamon.
10. Toss apple slices in lemon juice.
11. Combine the apple slices with the cinnamon mixture.
12. Arrange apple slices on top of the batter.
13. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean.
14. Serve warm.
